MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOSEPH C. BARTON, Tel No. (415) 775-4455 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER KURUSHIN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. Plaintiff demonstrates proper service. See Giorgio v. Synergy Mgmt. Group, LLC (2014) 231 Cal.App.4th 241. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
